NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of this 15th day of October 2023, by and between Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd., a company incorporated in Singapore with UEN T2345678A and its principal place of business at 123 Innovation Lane, Singapore 567890 ("Disclosing Party"), and Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC S2345678B, residing at 45 Serene Avenue, Singapore 098765 ("Receiving Party"). Contact: +65 6123 4567, email: emily.tan@example.sg.

1. Confidential Information. The Receiving Party agrees to maintain the confidentiality of all proprietary information disclosed by the Disclosing Party, including but not limited to business strategies, financial data, and intellectual property. Such information shall be marked as "Confidential" or be of a nature that a reasonable person would understand it to be confidential.

2. Non-Disclosure Obligations. The Receiving Party shall not disclose any Confidential Information to third parties without the prior written consent of the Disclosing Party. The Receiving Party shall use the same degree of care to protect the Confidential Information as it uses to protect its own confidential information, but in no event less than reasonable care.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
